---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new plugin idea
title: '[Feature] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Plugin Idea

**Proposed Plugin Name:**
**Plugin Type:** [ ] Slash Command  [ ] Hook  [ ] Output Style  [ ] MCP Server  [ ] Skill

## Problem Statement

What problem would this plugin solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the plugin would work and what it would do.

## Example Usage

```bash
# Show how users would interact with this plugin
/your-command example
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there any existing plugins or workarounds? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help explain the idea.

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] I'm willing to implement this plugin myself
- [ ] I can help test this plugin
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
